dataModels.description: Raw customer data loaded from CSV seed file
Raw order data loaded from CSV seed file
Raw payment data loaded from CSV seed file
Staged customer data with renamed columns
dataModels.rawSql:
WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('raw_customers') }}
)

SELECT
    id AS customer_id,
    first_name,
    last_name
FROM source

FROM source

dataModels.description: Staged payment data with renamed columns and converted amount from cents to dollars
dataModels.rawSql:
WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('raw_payments') }}
)

SELECT
    id AS payment_id,
    order_id,
    payment_method,
    amount / 100.0 AS amount
FROM source
dataModels.sql:
WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM jaffle_shop.public.raw_payments
)

SELECT
    id AS payment_id,
    order_id,
    payment_method,
    amount / 100.0 AS amount
FROM source

dataModels.description: This table has basic information about a customer, as well as some derived facts based on a customer's orders
dataModels.rawSql:
WITH customers AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('stg_customers') }}
),

orders AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('stg_orders') }}
),

payments AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('stg_payments') }}
),

customer_orders AS (
    SELECT
        customer_id,
        MIN(order_date) AS first_order,
        MAX(order_date) AS most_recent_order,
        COUNT(order_id) AS number_of_orders
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY customer_id
),

customer_payments AS (
    SELECT
        orders.customer_id,
        SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM payments
    LEFT JOIN orders ON payments.order_id = orders.order_id
    GROUP BY orders.customer_id
),

final AS (
    SELECT
        customers.customer_id,
        customers.first_name,
        customers.last_name,
        customer_orders.first_order,
        customer_orders.most_recent_order,
        customer_orders.number_of_orders,
        customer_payments.total_amount AS customer_lifetime_value
    FROM customers
    LEFT JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
    LEFT JOIN customer_payments ON customers.customer_id = customer_payments.customer_id
)

SELECT * FROM final
dataModels.sql:
WITH customers AS (
    SELECT * FROM jaffle_shop.public.stg_customers
),

orders AS (
    SELECT * FROM jaffle_shop.public.stg_orders
),

payments AS (
    SELECT * FROM jaffle_shop.public.stg_payments
),

customer_orders AS (
    SELECT
        customer_id,
        MIN(order_date) AS first_order,
        MAX(order_date) AS most_recent_order,
        COUNT(order_id) AS number_of_orders
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY customer_id
),

customer_payments AS (
    SELECT
        orders.customer_id,
        SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM payments
    LEFT JOIN orders ON payments.order_id = orders.order_id
    GROUP BY orders.customer_id
),

final AS (
    SELECT
        customers.customer_id,
        customers.first_name,
        customers.last_name,
        customer_orders.first_order,
        customer_orders.most_recent_order,
        customer_orders.number_of_orders,
        customer_payments.total_amount AS customer_lifetime_value
    FROM customers
    LEFT JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
    LEFT JOIN customer_payments ON customers.customer_id = customer_payments.customer_id
)

SELECT * FROM final

columns.name: first_order
columns.description: Date of the customer's first order

columns.name: most_recent_order
columns.description: Date of the customer's most recent order

columns.name: number_of_orders
columns.description: Total number of orders placed by the customer

columns.name: customer_lifetime_value
columns.description: Total amount spent by the customer across all orders

dataModels.description: This table has one row per order with order details and payment amounts broken down by payment method
dataModels.rawSql:
WITH orders AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('stg_orders') }}
),

payments AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('stg_payments') }}
),

order_payments AS (
    SELECT
        order_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN payment_method = 'credit_card' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS credit_card_amount,
        SUM(CASE WHEN payment_method = 'coupon' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS coupon_amount,
        SUM(CASE WHEN payment_method = 'bank_transfer' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS bank_transfer_amount,
        SUM(CASE WHEN payment_method = 'gift_card' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS gift_card_amount,
        SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM payments
    GROUP BY order_id
),

final AS (
    SELECT
        orders.order_id,
        orders.customer_id,
        orders.order_date,
        orders.status,
        order_payments.credit_card_amount,
        order_payments.coupon_amount,
        order_payments.bank_transfer_amount,
        order_payments.gift_card_amount,
        order_payments.total_amount AS amount
    FROM orders
    LEFT JOIN order_payments ON orders.order_id = order_payments.order_id
)

SELECT * FROM final

WITH orders AS (
    SELECT * FROM jaffle_shop.public.stg_orders
),

        order_payments.total_amount AS amount

    LEFT JOIN order_payments ON orders.order_id = order_payments.order_id
)

SELECT * FROM final

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Foreign key to the customers table

columns.name: status
columns.description: Order status: placed, shipped, completed, return_pending, or returned

columns.name: amount
columns.description: Total order amount across all payment methods
